passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Printed on the photo page of your passport. Letters and numbers only.

errors.tooShort: Passport number too short — min 6 characters
errors.tooLong: Passport number too long — max 12 characters
errors.invalidChars: Letters and numbers only — no spaces or symbols

full_name.label: Full name (as in passport)
full_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only).

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents or special characters

errors.tooEarly: Date of birth seems too far in the past — double check
errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be in the future

flight_number.label: Flight or vessel number
flight_number.help: Airline 2-letter IATA code + flight number (e.g. GA456 for Garuda Indonesia, AK788 for AirAsia). For cruise, use the ship's identifier.

errors.required: Flight or vessel number is required
errors.invalidFormat: Format: airline code + number (e.g. GA456). No spaces.

arrival_date.label: Arrival date in Indonesia
arrival_date.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD — the date you land in Indonesia (Jakarta time)

errors.tooLate: Arrival date seems too far in the future

port_of_entry.label: Port of entry
port_of_entry.help: Airport IATA code or named seaport. CGK = Jakarta, DPS = Bali, SUB = Surabaya, BPN = Balikpapan.

accommodation.label: Address in Indonesia
accommodation.placeholder: Hotel Example, Jl. Sunset Road, Kuta, Bali
accommodation.help: Where you will stay first night. Hotel name + address is enough for tourism.
